name: Jellynix
description: Jellynix adds private recommendation playlists and item-scoped recommendation retrieval backed by a strictly local sidecar service.
overview: Privacy-first Jellyfin recommendations with a local sidecar

versions.changelog: Live installation build with the plugin pairing wizard, protected local bridge credentials, and the Jellyfin settings-page wrapper fix.
Cache-busting republish of the live installation build with the plugin pairing wizard, protected local bridge credentials, and the Jellyfin settings-page wrapper fix.
Polished the Jellyfin pairing wizard layout with a card-based admin UI, clearer hierarchy, and better native Jellyfin controls.
Fixed the plugin wizard fragment so inline styles load inside Jellyfin, status refresh initializes immediately, and the action buttons use reliable native HTML controls.
Hardened the pairing wizard so Save Settings and Test Connection initialize reliably inside Jellyfin admin, disable during requests, and surface inline errors instead of failing silently.

Carries the restart-safe plugin storage, calmer bridge backlog view, left Plugins navigation registration, and the separate jellynix-home hub route as a fresh installable plugin package after the 0.1.0.4 live cache path turned out to be too sticky for reliable host-side verification.
